clue: A 2011 University of Northampton study found that dairy cows have preferred partners and show a raised heart rate and higher stress when they are ___ from those best friends.
To survive dry or harsh weather, some snails can enter a dormant state and stay asleep for up to ___ years.
By slowing their heart rate, three-toed sloths can hold their breath underwater for up to ___ minutes, far longer than a dolphin.
The heart of a blue whale is so enormous that it weighs roughly ___ pounds.
The silk of Darwin's bark spider is the toughest biological material ever measured, more than ten times tougher than ___.
